timing.summary: Always active according to source context
rules: Creature source: always active while creature is active in battle.
Battlegear source: active only while gear is face-up on equipped creature.
Mugic source: active until end of turn.
Location source: active while location is active; target resolution must follow location text.
Location source: target defined by location effect text.

condition_rule.summary: No extra gate besides source validity and target validity
rules: Effect applies only if source is currently active.
Effect applies only if target is currently valid.
Target gets +5 damage for the configured element whenever it executes an attack that has that same element.
Multiple active ELEMENTO_X sources stack additively.
Creature and battlegear duration persist while source remains active.
Mugic duration ends at end of turn.
Location duration persists while location remains active.

examples: If target has ELEMENTO_X configured as water, each water attack from that target gains +5 water damage.
If two separate active sources grant ELEMENTO_X water, total bonus is +10 water damage.

preferred_mapping.notes: Use existing element modifier model when source text is direct and static.
Apply on attack resolution for matching element only.

gaps: Need explicit location-target resolution path for all location templates.
